productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Buckel Black Casual Shoe
description: The party season's here and it's time to ramp up your wardrobe with this classy boot from catwalk. Crafted with durable material in a stylish design, this boot is designed to look great with all western wear. Upper Synthetic leather upper with a high ankle Perforations at the collar for breathable comfort Adjustable strap around the ankle for a customised Fit Fabric inner lining for all-day comfort Synthetic leather lined footbed Outsole TPR outsole with grooves on the forefoot for absolute grip shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
